label: Reliquary Storage Vault
description: The Reliquary Storage Vault occupies a low, buttressed chamber behind the chapel’s transepts, its black vitrified-stone walls braced with ceramite ribs to resist stormshock. Polished basalt flagstones bear incised inventory litanies, their grooves packed with ash-ground grit tracked in from the shielded causeways. Vox-damping baffles and sealable conduit ports line the upper courses, isolating stored devotional gear from Nocturnis Bastion’s constant interference. Stacked plasteel lockers and sanctified crate racks rise to the spring of the vault, each face marked with stamped purity wards and soot-dark handling scars.
